prompt: Minimalist commercial ad featuring oversized white Nike sneakers, ultra-clean design. A young woman in all-white outfit leans casually against the giant shoe, relaxed confident pose, eyes closed. Soft gradient blue background with large bold white “NIKE” text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, modern high-end fashion/product photography. Small top-right text “Designed by Mr Das”. Bottom center tagline in small white font: “Made to move, built for confidence.”
